/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/p2ptransfer.dir/p2ptransfer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2ptransfer.dir/src/core/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2ptransfer.dir/src/core/filemanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2ptransfer.dir/src/network/p2pengine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2ptransfer.dir/src/network/discovery.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2ptransfer.dir/src/ui/mainview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2ptransfer.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o p2ptransfer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Quick.so.6.4.2 -lstdc++ /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6QmlModels.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Qml.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
